summary: Buyer-facing deal read model that exposes deals matched to buyer buy-boxes (with buyer-safe proof) and records buyer interest -- never raw seller contact data.

files.role: buildInvestorMarketplace(): pure buyer-facing deal read model (matches deals to buy-boxes).
rankBuyerDemand() used to match deals to buyers.
Buyer interest model recorded against deals.
buyerSafeProofStack() provides the redacted proof shown with each deal.
Spread evaluation behind each deal's economics.

routes.summary: Lists buyer-safe deals matched to buy-boxes.
Records a buyer's interest in a deal (writes marketplace_interest).

tests.role: Privacy boundary tests -- ensures buyer-safe redaction holds.

tables.name: properties
tables.role: Source of deals exposed in the marketplace.

tables.name: buyers
tables.role: Buyers whose buy-boxes deals are matched against.

docs.role: Defines the investor marketplace boundary (buyer-facing, no raw seller contact).

audit_findings.finding: Marketplace view has a real buyer-safe boundary, but the relationship between buyer demand and property proof should be more visible: why a buyer matches this deal, what is redacted, what proof supports it, what is still uncertain.
Marketplace is part of the compliance/privacy surface -- buyer views must not leak seller contact or competing buyer identity.

next_actions.action: Make 'why this buyer matches this deal' an explicit, inspectable match explanation rather than an opaque ranking.
Show the redaction set and remaining uncertainty alongside each deal's proof.
